name: Entra Privileged Accounts Without MFA
description: Detects privileged entra accounts missing MFA protections.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.display_name AS account_name FROM entra_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.account_enabled, true) = true AND (LOWER(COALESCE(u.user_type, '')) LIKE '%admin%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.user_type, '')) LIKE '%owner%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.user_type, '')) LIKE '%super%') AND COALESCE(u.mfa_registered, false) = false
remediation: Immediately enforce MFA on privileged identities and suspend privileged actions until compliant.
